author: @TheParkAttendant
text: I absolutely love your wacky wizard vibe. What ever village you landed in would absolutely love you. Merry Christmas

author: @topspeed250k5
text: Fun fact: as well as being used in heat packs, Sodium Acetate provides the flavour for Salt and Vinegar chips. Sodium for the salt and Acetate for the vinegar. (Vinegar is Acetic Acid)

replies.author: @nandingpanelo
replies.text: Merry Christmas...do you suggest that if i mix salt and vinegar it will be sodium acetate?

author: @karlmyers6518
text: As long as its hot ice and not the other kind.

author: @marianb794
text:
Ho, ho, ho ho! Magician Rob,  I'm best friend of Santa. Which Santa? 
Santa, Santa Close! 
Every time I drink a beer he is coming to me. 
Last night I asked him to show me a formula to weakening water bond before electrocuted. I tried pee, glycerin, Koh... not satisfied with results.
Santa said to ask your advice, you are king of chemistry, so...
God bless you and your family specially now in the Eve of the birth of Jesus Christ!

author: @pattiannepascual
text:
you melted how much sodium acetate over fire? then added 10 water, then dipped a stick with unmelted sodium acetate on the end. Is this correct?
I want to try it but want to get it right to teach the family kids.
